summary: Consolidated particle/generator-related structs around baselib's real HSD names and propagated those types through effect and stage code. The PR replaced placeholder UnkGeneratorStruct/UnkGeneratorMember usage with HSD_Generator and HSD_psAppSRT, renamed raw transform fields to semantic translate/rot/scale and pos/vel Vec3 members, moved/centralized declarations into baselib/forward.h and psstructs.h, and updated callers in efasync, eflib, grlib, and stage files. Decomp.dev reported a net +440 bytes matched, including new full matches for efLib_8005FCD8 and efLib_8005C9FC, with several eflib improvements but also four unmatched-function regressions.
what_changed: Removed the older UnkGeneratorStruct and UnkGeneratorMember definitions from psappsrt.h and replaced the API return type psAddGeneratorAppSRT_begin(UnkGeneratorStruct*, s32) with psAddGeneratorAppSRT_begin(HSD_Generator*, s32).
Promoted HSD_Generator, HSD_Particle, and HSD_psAppSRT forward typedefs into src/sysdolphin/baselib/forward.h and removed the UnkGeneratorMember/UnkGeneratorStruct forward typedefs.
Renamed struct forms in psstructs.h from internal underscored names to HSD-style names: struct HSD_psAppSRT, struct HSD_Particle, and struct HSD_Generator.
Converted HSD_psAppSRT fields from tra/sca to translate/scale while retaining rot; added fill through xA2 with a comment that it was added to match grLib_801C96F8.
Converted HSD_Particle scalar coordinate fields vx/vy/vz and x/y/z into Vec3 vel and Vec3 pos, and updated psdisp.c to use pp->vel and gp->pos.
Converted HSD_Generator scalar x/y/z and vx/vy/vz fields into Vec3 pos and Vec3 vel.
Updated many efasync.c sites from generator->x54->x8/x14/x24 patterns to generator->appsrt->translate/rot/scale.
Updated effect code naming from Effect::transform to Effect::translate in shown efasync.c call sites.
Retyped eflib functions such as efLib_8005C9FC, efLib_8005CAB0, efLib_8005CB34, and related helpers to return/use HSD_Generator rather than placeholder generator structs.
Updated stage/ground variable structs and uses, including grStadium_type9_GroundVars::xC8 and Last_GroundVars::xE0, from UnkGeneratorStruct* to HSD_Generator*.
Adjusted includes so users that only need declarations include baselib/forward.h, while implementation files using fields include baselib/psstructs.h.
smart_moves: Consolidated duplicate placeholder generator/app-SRT declarations into the authoritative particle structs header instead of keeping parallel UnkGeneratorStruct definitions in psappsrt.h.
Used semantic Vec3 members for related x/y/z and vx/vy/vz triples, making field access both clearer and closer to the underlying transform/vector model.
Kept offsets visible in comments during struct renaming, preserving decomp verification value while improving names.
Added only the needed HSD_psAppSRT fill and xA2 member with an explicit match rationale for grLib_801C96F8, documenting why an otherwise odd tail field exists.
Threaded type changes through effect and stage callers in one PR, avoiding a half-migrated state where both UnkGeneratorStruct and HSD_Generator would remain in active use.
Preserved vararg behavior in efasync while clarifying case 0x446 arguments as HSD_JObj* and Vec3* before calling efLib_8005FCD8.
decomp_lessons: When unknown structs repeatedly appear as field-offset access patterns, replace offset names only after identifying the shared baselib type and update all users together.
For transform-like structs, naming x8/x14/x24 as translate/rot/scale makes later matching and reviewer reasoning easier than keeping placeholder offset fields.
Combining three adjacent scalar floats into a Vec3 can improve readability and sometimes matching, but every caller must be audited for component ordering and address-taking behavior.
Place forward typedefs in baselib/forward.h and full field definitions in psstructs.h; avoid forcing large struct headers into files that only need pointer types.
If padding or tail fields are introduced solely for a known match, leave a precise comment naming the function that requires it.
Large type renames can create both improvements and regressions in unmatched code; check decomp.dev function-level reports, not only total matched bytes.
naming_conventions: Use HSD_psAppSRT instead of UnkGeneratorMember or _psAppSRT.
Use appsrt for the HSD_Generator pointer to its HSD_psAppSRT data, replacing x54.
Use translate for the AppSRT position vector, replacing x8 or tra.
Use rot for the AppSRT rotation quaternion/vector field, replacing x14 access in migrated call sites.
Use scale for the AppSRT scale vector, replacing x24 or sca.
Use pos for particle/generator position Vec3, replacing x/y/z scalar fields.
Use vel for particle/generator velocity Vec3, replacing vx/vy/vz scalar fields.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Retyped helper returns from placeholder pointers to HSD_Generator* so later member accesses compile as generator->appsrt->translate/rot/scale rather than repeated casts through x54.
Introduced Vec3 pos/vel field grouping to match code that treats adjacent floats as vectors while preserving original offsets.
Used explicit local typed temporaries such as HSD_Generator* generator_1 and HSD_psAppSRT* psAppSRT_1 in efAsync_80063930 to guide codegen and reduce ambiguous void*/placeholder access.

Maintained direct chained member writes like generator_1->appsrt->scale.x = generator_1->appsrt->scale.y = generator_1->appsrt->scale.z = f32_1 where the original code set the same scalar into all components.
Changed efasync case 0x446 from generic void* varargs to typed HSD_JObj* and Vec3* arguments when passing to efLib_8005FCD8, coinciding with efLib_8005FCD8 becoming a new full match.
Decomp.dev evidence: efLib_8005FCD8 improved from 38.46% to 100.00%, efLib_8005C9FC from 91.11% to 100.00%, and total matched code increased by 440 bytes.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the provided slice.
Automated decomp.dev report showed 2 new matches: efLib_8005FCD8 (+160 bytes) and efLib_8005C9FC (+16 bytes).

Automated decomp.dev report showed 9 unmatched-function improvements, including efLib_8005D044, efLib_8005D174, efLib_8005CE48, efLib_8005CC84, efLib_8005CD2C, fn_8005BC50, efLib_8005CF40, efLib_8005CAB0, and grIceMt_801F7080.
Automated decomp.dev report also flagged regressions in efLib_8005E090, efLib_8005EBC8, efLib_8005E2B4, and efLib_8005CB34.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching HSD_psAppSRT x31_fill or xA2 added for grLib_801C96F8.
Search for remaining UnkGeneratorStruct or UnkGeneratorMember references after PR 1723.
Review later fixes for efLib_8005E090, efLib_8005EBC8, efLib_8005E2B4, and efLib_8005CB34 regressions from this consolidation.
Search for additional particle Vec3 pos/vel migrations in sysdolphin/baselib.
Find PRs that further rename Effect::translate or related effect transform fields.
